scenario.name: stir_shaken_attestation_403
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: <sip:+12155551212@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:+12155551212@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Identity: eyJhbGciOiJFUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6InBhc3Nwb3J0IiwicHB0Ijoic2hha2VuIiwieDV1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly8xMjcuMC4wLjE6MS9jLmNydCJ9.eyJhdHRlc3QiOiJBIiwiZGVzdCI6eyJ0biI6WyIxMDAwIl19LCJpYXQiOjE3MTYwMDAwMDAsIm9yaWciOnsidG4iOiIrMTIxNTU1NTEyMTIifX0.AQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQ;info=<https://127.0.0.1:1/c.crt>;alg=ES256;ppt=shaken Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
